zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Béthune於1153年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，她的父親Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre34歲，母親Adelaide de Saint-Pol24歲。她於1175年與Hugues Ier d’Heuchin在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年12月7日享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Béthune于1153年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，她的父亲Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre34岁，母亲Adelaide de Saint-Pol24岁。她于1175年与Hugues Ier d’Heuchin在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年12月7日享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Béthune was born in 1153, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, was 34 and her mother, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, was 24. She married Hugues Ier d’Heuchin in 1175, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1220, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Béthune est née en 1153, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues Ier d’Heuchin en 1175, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1220, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Béthune 1153 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre 34 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Saint-Pol 24. Sie hat 1175 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Hugues Ier d’Heuchin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1220 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune è nata il nel 1153 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Hugues Ier d’Heuchin nel 1175, nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1220, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthuneが1153年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acreは34歳，母Adelaide de Saint-Polは24歳であった。1175年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンでHugues Ier d’Heuchinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1220年12月7日に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthune(이)가 1153년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Saint-Pol(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1175년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 Hugues Ier d’Heuchin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 12월 7일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune nasceu em 1153, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues Ier d’Heuchin em 1175, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1220, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Béthune родилась в 1153 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Saint-Pol, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues Ier d’Heuchin в 1175 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1220 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Béthune nació en 1153, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Saint-Pol, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hugues Ier d’Heuchin en 1175, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1220, a la edad de 67 años.
